task: Find the next available dates for Alley Creek Camp.
final_result_response:
I now have a comprehensive view of the availability at Alley Creek Camp. The next available dates start from **today, March 1, 2026**, with the vast majority of the ~80 campsites showing full availability. Only a handful of sites at the bottom of the list (sorted by availability) have some reservations during the March 1-10 window. Let me declare my result.

Based on my thorough review of the Alley Creek Camp availability calendar on recreation.gov, the next available dates for Alley Creek Camp are **starting from March 1, 2026 (today)** onward. The campground has wide-open availability across the vast majority of its approximately 80 campsites (across loops R1, R2, T1, T2, and Gcam). Most sites show full availability from March 1 through at least March 10, 2026. Only a small number of sites (such as E205, E221, E202, E109) have limited or no availability due to existing reservations during parts of that window. Pricing ranges from $18–$175 per night.

The next available date for Alley Creek Camp is **Sunday, March 1, 2026**.
